summary: Verified Payroll Calculator with 3-column pamphlet layout and Hindi language switching. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Payroll Calculator - 3 column layout (Select Employee & Month, Calculation Steps, Net Salary Calculation)
Payroll Calculator - Employee dropdown selection works (2 employees available)
Payroll Calculator - Salary calculations are correct (₹12,000 - ₹2,600 daily allowance = ₹9,400 Gross)
Payroll Calculator - Absent days deduction works correctly (2 days absent = ₹723.08 deduction)
Payroll Calculator - Final Salary To Be Paid displays correctly in green box (₹8,676.92 with absences)
Payroll Calculator - Per Day Rate calculation shown (₹313.33)
Payroll Calculator - Days Worked indicator shows 24/26 with absences
Hindi Language - Settings > Language tab shows English and Hindi options
Hindi Language - Clicking Hindi updates sidebar labels to Hindi
Hindi Language - Section dividers show Hindi text (पार्टी और खाता, छूट और ऑफर, मानव संसाधन प्रबंधन, सेटिंग्स)
Hindi Language - Theme button shows 'थीम' with 'लाइट' badge
Hindi Language - Salary Calculator shows 'वेतन कैलकुलेटर' in sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: PayrollCalculatorPage.js: Well-structured 3-column layout using CSS grid (lg:grid-cols-3)
PayrollCalculatorPage.js: Each column has distinct color theme (blue, orange, green) matching pamphlet style
PayrollCalculatorPage.js: Salary calculation logic correctly handles absent days deduction
PayrollCalculatorPage.js: Final salary displayed in prominent green gradient box with attendance badge
LanguageContext.js: Comprehensive translations including 'salaryCalculator' key for new feature
App.js: Sidebar correctly uses t() function for all menu items including new Salary Calculator
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two features verified: 1) Payroll Calculator with 3-column pamphlet layout - accessible via sidebar HR Management > Salary Calculator. Shows employee selection, calculation steps, and final salary in green box. 2) Hindi language switching works - go to Settings > Language tab > click Hindi button. All sidebar items, theme toggle, and section dividers translate correctly.
